basics.name: Hitesh Hareshlal Rochlani
basics.title: Software Engineer Intern | Backend, DevOps & Automation
basics.summary: I’m a Software Engineer Intern with hands-on experience in backend development, DevOps, and automation testing. I’ve worked at OneStopEngineering as a Software Engineering Intern and DevOps Intern, where I contributed to backend development, database integration, CI/CD pipelines, and Docker-based deployments. I’ve worked with Java, PHP (Laravel), JavaScript, React, Node.js, Docker, Jenkins, Cypress, and Apache Kafka, and I enjoy building real-world, scalable systems. I’m currently open to Software Engineer Intern, Backend, DevOps, or QA Automation opportunities.

bullets: Performed code conversion and implemented Jenkins CI/CD pipelines for automated backend build, testing, and deployment.
Dockerized applications and deployed on Linux-based environments for scalable and containerized backend services.
Developed backend master tables and managed database integration using MySQL (via phpMyAdmin/XAMPP)
Performed end-to-end testing using Cypress and collaborated in agile sprints.

projects.title: Live StockStream
description: Developed a real-time stock streaming pipeline using WebSocket APIs and Apache Kafka with pub-sub model and topic partitions.
Stored tick data in PostgreSQL, cached it in Redis, and delivered live updates to a React UI via WebSockets.
Containerized all services using Docker for reliable deployments and smooth end-to-end integration.

projects.title: StackOverflow Clone with CI/CD Automation
description: Built a StackOverflow like Q&A platform in Laravel.
Used GitLab for code conversion and integrated Jenkins CI/CD pipeline for automated Linux deployment.

projects.title: Expense Tracker API
description: Built a backend for user authentication and managing daily expenses with CRUD and summary endpoint.
Implemented JWT-based authentication, filtering, search, and aggregation.
Tested all APIs using Postman, ready for frontend integration.

projects.title: Real-Time Messaging Server
description: Developed Java multi-client server with Sockets & threads.
Implemented real-time bi-directional communication between server and multiple clients.
Built a server admin console to send messages dynamically to specific clients.

projects.title: SmartBlog Generator
description: Scraped trending blogs from selected websites using Firecrawl, converting content into structured JSON.
Used LLMs to analyze and rank articles based on quality and relevance.
Generated a combined blog/newsletter from top-ranked articles for users.

projects.title: Expense Tracker
description: Built a React.js app for personal finance with authentication and categorized transactions.
Created dashboards with Chart.js for visualizing income and expenses.
Implemented reusable components and custom hooks for clean, scalable code.

projects.title: Student Management System
description: Developed a Java Swing system with full CRUD functionality for student data.
Integrated MySQL via JDBC with a secure login system for controlled access.
Designed a user-friendly interface for efficient data management.

projects.title: Notepad
description: Java and AWT (Abstract Window Toolkit) are used in the creation of this project.
Designed a user interface replicating core Notepad functionalities.
Implemented Event Handling and File operations including New, Open, Save, Save As, and Replace All.

projects.title: Mobile E-Commerce App Automation
description: Automated an Android e-commerce app covering login, cart operations, checkout, and order completion using Appium with Node.js.
Handled dynamic UI elements, scrolling actions, and UiAutomator2 stability issues on a real device.

projects.title: Online Assessment Platform
description: Performed end-to-end testing of assessment web app using Cypress with built-in Electron for automated browser handling.
Testing covered key functions like practice exams, login, and registration.

projects.title: Music-Player
description: Implemented a Java based music player with playlist management
Developed methods for next, previous, and replay functionalities.
Added features to list all songs, display interactive menu, and remove tracks from playlist.

projects.title: E-commerce Rest
description: Tested REST APIs using Postman for buyer/seller and product workflows.
Validated CRUD operations, response codes, and JSON payloads.
Identified edge cases and ensured API stability

projects.title: Film Fiesta
description: Developed a movie browsing app with React.js to explore popular, top-rated, and upcoming movies.
It also shows a detailed movie pages displaying descriptions, genres, ratings, runtime, budget, and revenue.

projects.title: Phila Tours
description: This tour information website was made using PostCSS, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Utilized NPM to run scripts, manage dependencies, and distribute Node.js modules.
Implemented Webpack for efficient bundling and optimization of project files.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science
